title: feat(observability): update JsonExporter to support all signals (T/M/L/S/F)

summary: Phase 2.2 of the observability implementation: extends JsonExporter to handle logs, metrics, scores, and feedback events alongside tracing spans. Adds onLogEvent/onMetricEvent/onScoreEvent/onFeedbackEvent handlers, cross-signal query methods (getByTraceId, getLogsByLevel, getMetricsByName), updated getStatistics() with signal breakdowns, internal metrics collection, and 32 new tests. Created by maintainer epinzur with Claude Code assistance.
maintainerNotes: This PR is almost certainly superseded by #13612 (merged March 3), which was also authored by epinzur and explicitly renames JsonExporter → TestExporter while extending it to support all signal types — the same goal as this PR. The branch has merge conflicts (CONFLICTING state) and the Vercel assistant-ui check is failing. No human reviews were requested or submitted. The PR has been inactive since Feb 26. Recommend closing as superseded by #13612.
